message:
fix: make durability probes side-effect-free

Replace `open_sqlite_file_with_recovery()` with `DbConn::open_file()` in
`durability_probe_query()`.  The recovery opener could trigger REINDEX
and fallback-database opens during what should be a read-only post-commit
verification, causing committed rows to vanish and surfacing as
"Resource is temporarily busy" errors.

The plain opener plus the existing PRAGMA_CONN_SETTINGS_SQL (which sets
busy_timeout = 60000) is sufficient — WAL mode is inherited from the
database file header.

Fixes #75.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
